title: Who is that
wikitext:
[]: Who is that             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Dec 25, 2009 5:57 pm I'm sitting here looking at an AMV and listening to the music cause I mean it fits well with Eva but I saw an image and we all know the fast images of Eva and all that they hold but I do ask..Who is that at 4:08? http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mNfUI620AIs Is that Anno, I have no idea really.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Fri Dec 25, 2009 6:52 pm 4:08 is a quick montage. Whom are you referring to? Most of it is just flashing words with some faded images in between. It looks like they just used the mindrape scene from Ep. 22, so I'm sure you could freeze-frame your DVDs through that section for clarity.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Dec 25, 2009 6:58 pm I took a screen cap, srsly who is that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Dec 25, 2009 7:11 pm I'll tell you what it's not: somebody important.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Dec 25, 2009 8:20 pm I took a screen cap, srsly who is that.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Fri Dec 25, 2009 8:22 pm it looks like a ghostly Fu Manchu

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Dec 25, 2009 8:54 pm It's Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Dec 25, 2009 8:54 pm Its Lilith without her mask on.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Dec 25, 2009 10:01 pm esselfortium wrote: It's Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Dec 25, 2009 10:18 pm Its Mario in an ill-conceived cameo appearance.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Dec 25, 2009 10:41 pm I mean it is completely there, I have to think its Anno but I well I'm still a bit confused.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 26, 2009 12:43 am Supposedly it was the face of an aborted fetus: can't remember the thread but that much I remember. The image is from a quick cut in DC22' just fyi.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Dec 26, 2009 2:01 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Supposedly it was the face of an aborted fetus: can't remember the thread but that much I remember. The image is from a quick cut in DC22' just fyi.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Dec 26, 2009 2:03 am Supposedly it was the face of an aborted fetus

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Dec 26, 2009 2:45 am So this was found before, did anyone get a final on what or who it was?

[]:             Quote Post by AVman9 » Sat Dec 26, 2009 2:48 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: So this was found before, did anyone get a final on what or who it was?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Dec 26, 2009 3:09 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: So this was found before, did anyone get a final on what or who it was?

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Sat Dec 26, 2009 3:22 pm Another view of it:

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Dec 26, 2009 5:30 pm Ironfoot wrote: Another view of it:

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sat Dec 26, 2009 5:33 pm its the baby that died in episode 19, which was talked about in that one thread it all makes sense now
